## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link any related issue, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

<!-- The commit type drives the next version number — see CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (`fix:`) — patch release
- [ ] ✨ New feature (`feat:`) — minor release
- [ ] ⬆️ Dependency / stack upgrade (`deps:`)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / housekeeping (`chore:`, `ci:`, `build:`, `style:`)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (`refactor:`) — no behaviour change
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (`!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:`) — major release

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org).
- [ ] `vendor/bin/pint --test` passes.
- [ ] `php artisan test` passes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for any behavioural change.
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant.
